description: Lock electric_fans to motor-driven fan devices and remove broad category/regulatory prerequisites.

checks.reason: The date remains anchored to Edison Tech Center and ETHW's 1886 Wheeler electric-fan chronology.
A motor remains required because the node is scoped to motor-driven fans.
Early electrical appliances are a broad category that includes electric fans, not a separate predecessor.
Industrial safety regulation is possible guarding or deployment context, not a source-backed prerequisite for electric fans.
